summary: Copy Trading Phase 2 testing completed successfully. All 22 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests verified Copy Trading page, Follow Trader Modal, Settings Modal, Leaderboard integration, and upgrade gate for non-Pro users.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement needed

DELETE /api/copy/unfollow/{id} - Unfollow a trader ✓
PUT /api/copy/settings - Update mode, allocation %, max_per_trade, status ✓
GET /api/copy/following - List traders user follows ✓
GET /api/copy/followers - List followers of current user ✓
GET /api/copy/pending - Get pending manual copy trades ✓
POST /api/copy/approve/{trade_id} - Approve pending trade (invalid ID returns 400) ✓
POST /api/copy/reject/{trade_id} - Reject pending trade (invalid ID returns 400) ✓
Safety: Cannot follow yourself ✓
Safety: Cannot create duplicate follow ✓
Safety: Allocation validated (1-100) - 0% and 150% rejected ✓
Safety: Max per trade enforced ✓
Copy Trading page (/copy-trading) shows upgrade gate for non-Pro users ✓
Copy Trading page shows stats cards (Following, Followers, Trades Copied, Pending) for Pro users ✓
Copy Trading page shows following list with pause/resume, settings, unfollow buttons ✓
Copy Trading page tabs work (Following, Pending, Followers) ✓
Leaderboard page (/leaderboard) has 'Copy' button for Pro users on trader rows ✓
Leaderboard trader profile dialog has 'Copy This Trader' button for Pro users ✓
Follow Trader Modal with mode selection (Auto/Manual), allocation slider, max per trade input ✓
Settings Modal with mode dropdown, allocation slider, max per trade input, save button ✓
Login flow works with test credentials (demo_test2@my-alpha-ai.com / NewPass1234!) ✓
All API endpoints require authentication (401 without token) ✓
Response structure validation - no MongoDB _id leaked ✓
critical_code_review_comments: Copy trading service properly handles circular copying prevention (A->B while B->A)
Allocation percent is clamped to 1-100 range in service layer
Max per trade is clamped to 1-100000 range in service layer
MongoDB _id is properly excluded from all API responses
Copy trade execution uses paper trading simulation (MOCKED)
